title: Pit fighting
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pit fighting''' was a sport played by two or more creatures or individuals. To win, a creature had to kill the rival creature(s). Popular creatures in the sport included [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] and [[Kell dragon/Legends|kell dragons]]. This game attracted large amounts of gambling, and thus was favored by [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].

{{Stub}}
